purpose: Central delivery-status matrix showing, per D5 component and workagenda field, what public sources can prefill and what still needs validation, finance/controller confirmation, decisions or D6 dependency mapping.
guardrails: This matrix is a steering aid, not a workagenda draft or local decision.
No row is ready for workagenda drafting until validation, finance/controller status, governance and D6 dependencies are resolved or explicitly escalated.
Public-source working views must remain separate from local validation and finance/controller confirmation.

status_model.label: Beantwoord uit bron
status_model.meaning: Public/corpus source directly answers the field.

status_model.label: Bron suggereert antwoord, validatie nodig
status_model.meaning: Source-backed working view exists, but local validation is required.

status_model.label: Lokale validatie nodig
status_model.meaning: Local practice, owner, coverage, capacity or evidence must be confirmed.

status_model.label: Bestuurlijk besluit nodig
status_model.meaning: A decision is needed before the field can be used as workagenda position.

status_model.label: Finance/controller nodig
status_model.meaning: Funding, structural continuation or double-counting must be checked.

status_model.label: Zorgverzekeraar/Zvw-bevestiging nodig
status_model.meaning: Zvw-side purchase, contract or insurer role must be confirmed.

status_model.label: ICT/privacy/data-bevestiging nodig
status_model.meaning: Data, privacy, dashboard, reporting or operational accountability must be confirmed.

status_model.label: Wachten op landelijke handreiking
status_model.meaning: National guidance or template is still expected.

status_model.label: Optioneel / niet van toepassing
status_model.meaning: Item is optional, excluded or not applicable for the current scope.

status_model.label: Onbekend
status_model.meaning: Not enough information to classify yet.

rows.title: Laagdrempelige steunpunten

huidige_situatie.reason: Public sources support a working view, but local status and coverage still need validation.
evidence: GGD-indicatoren voor eenzaamheid, angst/depressierisico en broze gezondheid geven publieke urgentiesignalen.

gewenste_situatie.reason: National workagenda sources describe the target direction, but Almere/Flevoland must validate the local design.

ingroeipad_2030.reason: Prioritisation and phasing toward 2030 need a local or regional decision.

aantallen_capaciteit.reason: Indicators or indicative calculations exist, but capacity needs validation.
evidence: GGD-indicatoren voor eenzaamheid, angst/depressierisico en broze gezondheid geven publieke urgentiesignalen.

financiering.reason: Funding line, structural/project status and double-counting must be checked by finance/controller.

verantwoordelijkheid_governance.reason: Owner, coordinator, executor and mandate must be locally validated.

monitoring_lerende_cyclus.reason: Monitoring arrangement, data/reporting owner and learning-cycle accountability need confirmation.

mijlpalen.reason: National milestone structure exists, but local sequencing and action dates need validation.

d6_afhankelijkheden.reason: D6 prerequisites must be mapped explicitly before drafting.

open_besluiten_risicos.reason: Open decisions remain and must become validation, finance or decision tickets.

public_evidence: GGD-indicatoren voor eenzaamheid, angst/depressierisico en broze gezondheid geven publieke urgentiesignalen.
rows.next_action: Prepare constrained validation ticket: Welke bestaande Almeerse steunpunten tellen mee voor de werkagenda?
rows.action_owner: Gemeente Almere sociaal domein; sociale-basis partners; finance/controller

rows.title: Sociaal verwijzen

huidige_situatie.reason: Public sources support a working view, but local status and coverage still need validation.
evidence: Landelijke werkagenda-bron geeft richtinggevende capaciteit: 60 verwijzingen per 10.000 inwoners en 0,2-0,5 fte brugfunctie per 10.000 inwoners.
CBS 2025 denominator maakt een eerste indicatieve Almere-rekensom mogelijk.

rows.title: Valpreventie

huidige_situatie.reason: Public sources support a working view, but local status and coverage still need validation.
evidence: GGD Valpreventie Almere beschrijft publieke inloop/risico-inschatting en cursusmatching.
GGD-tabellenboek ouderen geeft publieke valindicatoren voor Almere.
Landelijke werkagenda-richting noemt valrisico-inschatting bij 14% van de 65-plussers.
